programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 teams up with a Russian task force to investigate the disappearance of a Russian SG team on P2X-338. They discover that the Russian SG team released a creature that killed Marduk, a Goa'uld, in his sarcophagus. SG-1 must trust their Russian partners in order to escape the ziggurat alive.

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: Johnny English goes up against international assassins hunting down Chinese Premier Xiang Ping.

programme.title: Tron: Legacy
programme.desc: The son of a computer programmer goes looking for his father and ends up inside the digital world that his father designed. He meets his father's corrupted creation and a unique ally who was born inside the digital world.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Experience life in the most hostile corners of the planet by exploring the terrain, seasons, and animals of the Arctic and Antarctic.
